step_rationale: Energy-metabolism enzyme; myocardial-necrosis marker; downregulated in CHF.
mechanism: Malate dehydrogenase is a mitochondrial enzyme whose reduced activity and release during myocardial infarction reflects cardiomyocyte necrosis and bioenergetic failure.

references.title: Changes in the Serum Metabolome of Acute Myocardial Ischemia Rat Pretreatment with Electroacupuncture.
references.journal: The American journal of Chinese medicine

references.title: Integrated proteomic and metabolomic analysis reveals the NADH-mediated TCA cycle and energy metabolism disorders based on a new model of chronic progressive heart failure.
